title: Dirk Yohan Beer
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Person
|image=[[File:BestNamedGent.png]]
|name=Dirk Yohan Beer
|birth=[[September 16]], [[1950s|1959]]<ref name="Facebook confirmation">[[:File:Yohanbeer.png|Dirk Yohan Beer confirmed he was in fact born on September 16th, 1959.]]</ref>
|death=
|listedpronouns=<!--Only include pronouns if they have been explicitly specified by the individual to which this article pertains.-->
|nationality=

'''Dirk Yohan Beer''' (born [[September 16]], [[1950s|1959]]<ref name="Facebook confirmation" />), otherwise known as '''Dickey Beer''',<ref name="Beer Interview" /> worked as a stunt performer on {{Film|VI}}.<ref name="ROTJ" /> He portrayed four different roles which were that of [[Barada]], [[Junkin|Sergeant Junkin]], a [[Stormtrooper]] and a [[Scout trooper|Biker Scout]] who was tackled by [[Ewok]]s.<ref name="Beer Interview">{{Blogspot|subdomain=starwarsinterviews1|url=2010/04/dickey-beer-interview-barada-star-wars.html|name=Star Wars Interviews|text=Dickey Beer interview}}</ref> He also was the stunt double for [[Jeremy Bulloch]]'s [[Boba Fett]],<ref name="Unite in Europe">{{WebCite|url=http://www.chipandco.com/boba-fett-actors-unite-star-wars-celebration-europe-ii-102872|text=Boba Fett Actors Unite at Star Wars Celebration Europe II|date=2013-03-25|archivedate=20150914180720}}</ref> who he also played in the [[Return of the Ewok|Ewok mockumentary]] later included as a easter egg for the 2004 original trilogy DVD releases, and also doubled [[Luke Skywalker]] in the same scene.<ref name="Fett Four">{{WebCite|url=https://www.bobafettfanclub.com/news/follow-fett/celebration-europe-ii-the-fett-tastic-four-panel|text=Celebration Europe II: The Fett-Tastic Four Panel|date=2013-07-28|archivedate=20200422035114}}</ref>

{{Bio-stub}}
